articles.title: Former Queensland premier Annastacia Palaszczuk’s surgeon partner charged with rape
articles.description: Vahid Reza Adib, a bariatric surgeon in Brisbane, has been charged with rape, sexual assault and deprivation of liberty Police have charged prominent Brisbane surgeon Vahid Reza Adib – the partner of former Queensland premier Annastacia Palaszczuk – with rape. Adib, a bariatric surgeon who runs an obesity clinic at the private Wesley hospital in Brisbane’s western suburbs, attended the Southport Police Station on the Gold Coast voluntarily on Friday. He was charged with three counts of rape, two counts of depravation of liberty and one count of sexual assault. Continue reading...

articles.title: DepEd district supervisor shot dead in Zamboanga Sibugay
articles.description: PAGADIAN CITY, Zamboanga del Sur — A Department of Education (DepEd) district supervisor was shot dead by unidentified assailants in Alicia town, Zamboanga Sibugay, on Thursday evening. Police said identified the victim as Rey Dalaota Camaingking, 45, a resident of Nesoricom Village, Barangay Magdaup, Ipil, Zamboanga Sibugay. Police said the incident took place at approximately 7:35 p.m. in Sitio Guicam, Barangay Dawa-Dawa, Alicia. READ: DepEd condemns violence vs lawyer shot dead in Palawan Responding officers found Camaingking lying on the ground, bleeding from a gunshot wound to the head.
